name: Name
loginDescription: Access your carbon tracker and continue reducing your footprint.
registerDescription: Create an account to log your footprint and climb the leaderboard.
loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.
registerError: Registration failed. Please try again with a valid email and password.
userNotFound: No account found with that email. Please register first.
invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
networkError: Network error. Check your internet connection.
tooManyAttempts: Too many failed login attempts. Please wait and try again later.
emailExists: This email is already registered. Please log in instead.
weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
firebaseNotConfigured: Firebase is not fully configured. Enable Email/Password auth in your Firebase console.
trackYourFootprint: Track your carbon footprint with insights and challenges.
useDailyPlanning: Use daily planning, sustainable lifestyle tips, and friendly competition to lower your emissions.
estimateEmissions: Estimate your daily, weekly, and monthly CO₂ emissions.
visualizeFootprint: Visualize your footprint and track progress across the week.
sustainabilityScoreDesc: Your current sustainability score is based on emissions, challenges, and energy habits.
engageSustainableGoals: Engage with sustainable goals designed to improve your carbon footprint.
noCarWeekDesc: Choose public transit, biking, or walking to reduce vehicle emissions for seven days.
zeroPlasticDesc: Avoid single-use plastics and switch to reusable containers, bags, and bottles.
treePlantationDesc: Plant native trees or support a local green initiative to offset carbon emissions.
rankBySustainability: See how users rank by sustainability score.
snapshotEcoHabits: A snapshot of your eco-friendly habits.
focusReducing: Focus on reducing car trips, eating plant-based meals, and lowering electricity.
tip2: Swap heavy meat days for vegetarian or vegan meals.
tip3: Save energy with smart home practices.
